name: zimage_font_is_column_transparent
description: zImage_Font::IsImageColumnTransparent checks whether every pixel in a column equals the configured transparent color.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zimage_init_helpers failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 67 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 73, VC object size 80, 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zimage_init_helpers/verify/46f210_byte_triage.txt.
